generated_oml:
// Physical Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with input current I_M and output torque τ_M"
]

instance GearWheel : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel with output torque τ_G"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox with output torque τ_out"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller driving motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox"
]

// Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on motor providing position and velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind gearbox providing position and velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, SecondaryEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor providing current data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// Data Transmitted Instances
instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MotorEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

// Data Instances
instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler, MQTTDataStreamingEnabler
]

instance MotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler, MQTTDataStreamingEnabler
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SecondaryEncoderVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CurrentSensorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current data from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler, MQTTDataStreamingEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque calculated from motor parameters and current data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity calculated from motor parameters and position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from MATLAB Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

// Models
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural model (Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink simulation model for permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink simulation model for gearwheel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink simulation model for cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

// Enablers
instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousMultiPhysicsFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousMultiPhysicsFrictionIdentificationService, RealTimeMotionAccuracyAnalysisService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMotionAccuracyAnalysisService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMotionAccuracyAnalysisService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables IntegratedDashboardVisualizationService
]

// Services
instance ContinuousMultiPhysicsFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionDynamicsInsight, AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction
]

instance IntegratedDashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMotionAccuracyAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time analysis for improving robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction
]

// Insights and Actions
instance JointFrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction dynamics used to adjust control algorithms for enhanced motion accuracy"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of real-time data and model outputs in a unified dashboard"
]

instance AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Decision making based on friction model identification and deviation analysis between simulated and measured data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Environment
instance MABIMAX100RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, a serial robot with six axes designed for machining tasks, featuring flexible rotary joints, 0.06 mm path repeatability, 0.1 mm positional accuracy, and 2 m functional reach"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearWheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor, SysMLStructuralModel, MATLABSimulinkMotorModel, MATLABSimulinkGearwheelModel, MATLABSimulinkGearboxModel, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, MotorPositionData, MotorVelocityData, SecondaryEncoderPositionData, SecondaryEncoderVelocityData, CurrentSensorCurrentData, DerivedTorqueData, DerivedAngularVelocityData, SimulatedOutputsData
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; the digital shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow from physical to virtual only, as per Kritzinger et al. [32]."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing and synchronization with sensor data streams via MQTT, enabling immediate feedback for friction model identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow comprising data traces linked to engineering, simulation, and data calculation models via processing components, with integrated visualization in a unified dashboard for real-time monitoring and analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, utilizing live operational data during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, and varying application conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured reference data to assess model accuracy and identify friction-related deviations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for industrial asset management, SysML for model-based systems engineering."
]
